mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_artist_follows (user_id, artist_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{artistId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_artist_follows WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artist_id = #{artistId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_artist_follows WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND artist_id = #{artistId}

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.fansCount, a.monthlyListeners, a.biography, a.avatarUrl, a.avatarNetworkUrl, a.createdAt FROM user_artist_follows f INNER JOIN artists a ON a.id = f.artist_id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_artist_follows WHERE artist_id = #{artistId}
